current_substrate.description: Mutex-protected intrusive stack with LIFO owner / FIFO steal
Power of Two Choices with deterministic RNG

candidates.description: Wait-free SPSC ring buffer for owner push/pop path
candidates.expected_improvement: +10-20% owner throughput, eliminates lock contention tail

candidates.description: Chase-Lev work-stealing deque replacing intrusive stack + dual-lock
Fixed-size atomic bitmap replacing Mutex<HashSet> for waker dedup
Timing wheel or calendar queue replacing Mutex<BinaryHeap>

decision_rules: Candidate MUST beat baseline by >10% on at least one key metric
Candidate MUST NOT regress any metric by >5%
Unsafe candidates MUST include proof sketch or reference
Winner MUST be gated behind fallback seam (AA-04.2)

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify candidate catalog completeness and required fields
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa041 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_substrate_comparison_contract candidate -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa041 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_substrate_comparison_contract current_substrate -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify evaluation dimensions and decision rules
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa041 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_substrate_comparison_contract evaluation -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa041 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_substrate_comparison_contract local_queue -- --nocapture
